title: UK prepares for food shortages in worst case scenario as Iran war continues
summary: The UK government has drawn up worst-case scenario plans that could result in food shortages by summer amid ongoing Iran-related conflicts. This reflects concerns about supply chain disruptions and regional instability affecting food imports.
content: The UK could face some food shortages by the summer under a worst case scenario drawn up by government officials.

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: PepsiCo, Taiwan Semiconductor, Voyager Technologies, PPG & more

title: Europe could run out of jet fuel in 6 weeks, IEA chief tells AP
summary: The International Energy Agency's director warned that Europe faces a critical jet fuel shortage within six weeks, signaling potential disruptions to aviation and energy security across the continent.
content: The International Energy Agency's head warned Thursday that Europe is going to run out of jet fuel in as soon as six weeks.

title: UK eases rules for hedge funds in sweeping overhaul of short selling rules
summary: The UK's Financial Conduct Authority has implemented major changes to short-selling regulations that ease restrictions for hedge funds. This regulatory shift aims to modernize the framework governing short-selling activities.
content: The U.K.'s Financial Conduct Authority has overhauled its rules on short-selling.

title: FanDuel's parent stock is under pressure. Citi doesn't see a recovery anytime soon
summary: FanDuel is experiencing declining customer engagement on its platform, and analysts at Citi are skeptical that its prediction market venture will boost its parent company's stock performance in the near term.
content: FanDuel has seen weakening customer engagement on its platform, while it isn't clear its prediction market can drive upside to its owner's stock, per Citi.

title: Sens. Warren and Blumenthal investigate NLRB decision to drop charges against SpaceX for retaliatory firings
summary: Democratic senators Elizabeth Warren and Richard Blumenthal are investigating the National Labor Relations Board's decision to drop charges against SpaceX in February for allegedly retaliatory employee firings.
content: Sens. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., and Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., are investigating the NLRB after it dropped charges against Elon Musk's SpaceX in February over retaliatory firings.

title: Don't call time on dollar dominance just yet, say analysts as 'petroyuan' call sparks debate
summary: While the dollar index fell nearly 10% through 2025, analysts argue the currency's dominance remains intact despite growing debate over alternative currencies like the petroyuan. Currency experts remain divided on the dollar's long-term outlook.
content: The dollar index, which tracks its performance against a basket of major currencies, fell almost 10% through 2025.

zh.title: 分析师称美元主导地位远未终结，'石油人民币'争议引发讨论
zh.summary: 尽管美元指数在2025年全年下跌近10%，但分析师辩称该货币的主导地位仍然完好无损，尽管人们对石油人民币等替代货币的讨论日益增加。货币专家对美元的长期前景看法不一。

title: ‘We keep our finances separate’: My boyfriend is in his 50s with no retirement savings — how worried should I be?
summary: A woman seeks financial advice about her boyfriend's lack of retirement savings despite being in his 50s, while noting they own their jointly-titled home mortgage-free. The article addresses concerns about financial compatibility and security in relationships.
content: “He built our home over the last three years. We are both on the title and carry no mortgage.”

zh.title: '我们各自管理自己的财务'：我的男友已经五十多岁却没有退休储蓄——我应该有多担心？

title: Why this market rally still has room to run — until these two signals flash

title: New Social Security proposal would cap payments for wealthy people now — and many more later on
summary: A new proposal would implement benefit caps for wealthy Social Security recipients immediately and expand coverage to more people later, potentially helping solve the program's fiscal challenges. The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget suggests such limits could significantly improve long-term sustainability.
content: Benefit limits could do a lot to solve Social Security’s fiscal problems, CRFB suggests. But check the fine print.

title: The E.U. asks Google to share its search-engine data with competitors
summary: The European Commission has proposed measures requiring Google to share its search engine data with competitors to reduce its market dominance. This regulatory action represents the EU's continued effort to constrain big tech's control over digital markets.

title: Mark Mobius, 'Indiana Jones of emerging markets,' dies at 89
summary: Mark Mobius, a legendary investor credited as a pioneer in emerging markets investing, passed away Wednesday at age 89. His career spanned decades establishing standards and strategies for emerging market investment.
content: Mark Mobius, widely credited as a pioneer in emerging markets investing, died on Wednesday at the age of 89, according to a statement on ⁠his LinkedIn page.

title: Lilly's obesity pill helps reduce cardiovascular risks in late-stage trial
summary: In a late-stage clinical trial of over 2,700 adults, Eli Lilly's obesity medication Foundayo demonstrated a 16% reduction in cardiovascular risks including heart attack and stroke. The results suggest the drug may offer broader health benefits beyond weight management.
content: In the study of more than 2,700 adults, patients taking Foundayo had a 16% lower risk of heart attack, stroke or cardiovascular death.

zh.title: 礼来减肥药在晚期临床试验中有助于降低心血管风险
